creator: vova@fbsd.ru
text:
just running vtysh produces such warning:

2024/07/09 20:27:48 [YDG3W-JND95] FD Limit set: 219780 is stupidly large.  Is this what you intended?  Consider using --limit-fds also limiting size to 100000

is it expected?


# sysctl kern.maxfiles
kern.maxfiles: 244205

14.1-RELEASE-p2 FreeBSD 14.1-RELEASE-p2 releng/14.1-1eba659e2f68
